explanations.1: This comment tells a documentation tool to highlight the next line visually when rendering this file.
explanations.2: CONTAINER_PREFIX is used to name Docker containers so they're grouped together with 'joomla_4' at the start.
explanations.15: MYSQL_PORT=3302 means the database will be accessible on port 3302 instead of the default 3306, so it won't conflict if you're already running MySQL elsewhere.
explanations.21: WEB_PORT=8082 is the port number you'll type into your browser's address bar to view the Joomla website locally.
